name: The Horus Heresy
note: Core arc — 54 numbered novels, Horus Rising → The Buried Dagger; Siege of Terra continues as siege_of_terra.

name: Siege of Terra
note: Climax arc — 8 main novels (the 8th, The End and the Death, ships in 3 parts but counts as one release) plus 3 novellas + 1 anthology.

name: Gaunt's Ghosts
note: Guard epic — 16 main novels through The Vincula Insurgency / Anarch arc; spin-offs (Double Eagle, Titanicus) count separately.

name: Ciaphas Cain
note: Satirical hero — 14 main novels through Vainglorious (2024); plus short story / novella anthology collected as 'The Anthology'.

name: Space Wolves
note: Ragnar Blackmane saga — 4 by William King (Space Wolf, Ragnar's Claw, Grey Hunter, Wolfblade) + 2 by Lee Lightner (Sons of Fenris, Wolf's Honour).

name: Horus Heresy: Primarchs
note: Per-Primarch novellas — 14 in the numbered Primarchs sub-series (some Primarchs covered via short stories/audio dramas instead of numbered novellas; Primarchs II and XI are excluded by lore).

name: The Beast Arises
note: M32 Waaagh of the Beast, multi-author.

name: Farsight
note: Tau Commander Farsight trilogy by Phil Kelly.
